untranslatable_reason: The signal requires intraday time-of-day filtering (morning vs. midday vs. afternoon) which cannot be expressed using only OHLCV indicators and standard technical analysis metrics. A time-of-day filter or session-based rule is needed but not available in the allowed indicator set. Additionally, the specific volume decline pattern toward midday and recovery toward close requires temporal/session awareness beyond bar-level data.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture the core volume requirement using vol_ratio_20 as a proxy for above-average volume and prev_volume comparison. However, the critical constraint—avoiding midday trades and favoring opening/closing sessions—is fundamentally a time-based rule that cannot be implemented with the allowed indicators. Direction marked NEUTRAL per signal specification. The rule is regime-locked to HIGH_VOL as specified.
